SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Services Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on 1 February 2023
between:

  (1) Northwind Industrial GmbH, a company incorporated in Germany
      ("Principal"); and

  (2) Sterling Liaison Partners SA, a company incorporated in Panama
      ("Agent").

WHEREAS the Principal wishes to retain the Agent in connection with
certain commercial opportunities in the West African region;

NOW THEREFORE the parties agree as follows:

1. Engagement. The Agent shall provide such services as the Principal
   may from time to time request.

2. Compensation. The Principal shall pay the Agent a commission equal
   to eighteen per cent (18%) of the gross value of any contract
   awarded to the Principal in the territory during the term.

3. Term. This Agreement shall commence on the date hereof and continue
   until terminated by either party upon 30 days' written notice.

4. Confidentiality. The existence and terms of this Agreement shall be
   treated as strictly confidential.

Signed for the Principal: ________________
Signed for the Agent:     ________________
